time_slice.name: Time Slice
time_slice.description: Setup/Builder: A strike that briefly pauses the foe's timeline. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Chrono Pip.

temporal_anchor.name: Temporal Anchor
temporal_anchor.description: Setup: Lock the target in their current state. Generates 1 Chrono Pip and applies [Slowed].

temporal_stasis.name: Temporal Stasis
temporal_stasis.description: Payoff: Completely freeze a target in time. Consumes 5 Chrono Pips to apply [Stunned] for 6 ticks.

chrono_burst.name: Chrono Burst
chrono_burst.description: Payoff: A burst of accelerated time energy. Consumes 3 Chrono Pips to deal heavy Magic damage and grant [Haste] to self.

rewind_death.name: Rewind
rewind_death.description: Defense: Rewind your own personal timeline. Removes all non-blessing debuffs on self.

time_dilation.name: Time Dilation
time_dilation.description: Defense: Slow down incoming projectiles. Reduces missile damage by 60% for self and all allies in room.

chrono_blink.name: Chrono Blink
chrono_blink.description: Mobility: Teleport to any location you were in during the last 5 ticks.

accelerated_destiny.name: Accelerated Destiny
accelerated_destiny.description: Utility/Signature: For 15 ticks, all cooldowns are reduced by 50% for all allies in the room.

temporalist_physiology.name: Temporalist Physiology
temporalist_physiology.description: Passive: Time Master. You gain 10% Haste and every Chrono Pip held increases your critical strike chance by 2%.
